title: False report of database corruption on an INSERT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT, c BLOB);
INSERT INTO t2 SELECT a+1, 'example', randomblob(400) FROM t2;
CREATE TRIGGER r2 AFTER INSERT ON t2 FOR EACH ROW WHEN NEW.a=2 BEGIN DELETE FROM t2 WHERE a=1;
key_bug_features: Trigger deletes while cursor is marked CURSOR_INVALID
